'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/sitemap-0.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=.W7ScW07jB1xo6CdQvEfPE338qhLJYy3NOP25qIYE8Q-1773891598-1.0.1.1-dfCRZOzPhIH_bSEiqXHZLnW3PGEo2pujuG6EeeVM_.4"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
